figures.title: 抗癌新药获批数量（中美对比）
figures.analysis: 彭博「今日图表」对比 2020–2025 年中美抗癌新药获批：中国 NMPA（橙）在 2023 年已超过美国 FDA（黑），2025 年进一步拉大至约 32 对 11（来源 Health Affairs）。含义：中国肿瘤创新药审评提速与管线兑现正在改写中美审批差距，短期 利好创新药/CXO 叙事，但也需跟踪疗效与出海临床数据是否跟上获批节奏。

marketTone: Jul 21 A-share full-day rally (Shanghai +1.79%, ChiNext +7.05%, turnover 2.96tn; semi deep-V per 第一财经) diverges from Jul 20 US risk-off (S&P −0.19%, Brent $89.22). Same-day Asia/UK prints: Taiwan Jun export orders +59.4% y/y beat estimate (47.3%); HK Jun CPI +2.0% y/y miss estimate (2.2%); UK May ILO unemployment 4.9% miss estimate (5.0%). Burnham/Healey fiscal “flexibility” pushed UK 10y gilts to 5.049%; Goldman PB record US tech de-grossing (彭博 Jul 21). Mag 7 earnings (Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22).

summary.text: Jul 21 A-share official close (网易财经): Shanghai +1.79%, Shenzhen +4.81%, ChiNext +7.05%, STAR +10.73%; turnover 2.96tn yuan (+255bn vs prior). 半导体设备指数深V：早盘一度−6.49%，午后涨超10.1%（第一财经 Jul 21）。PBOC Jul 21 net OMO +165亿元 (2530 − 2365亿元 @ 1.4%).

sources.label: 第一财经 semi V Jul 21

summary.text: Jul 20 US official close (CNBC): S&P −0.19% to 7,443.28, Nasdaq −0.05% to 25,508.07, Dow −0.59% to 51,839.26 — morning rally reversed on oil/Middle East; Apple −2%+ weighed. Brent settled $89.22 (+1.3%); 10y 4.594% (+5.3 bp).

Jul 21 UK fiscal shock (City AM/Independent): PM Andy Burnham said he would use “flexibility” within existing fiscal rules; 10y gilt yield rose ~8 bp to 5.049% (two-month high). John Healey named Chancellor in surprise move.

Jul 20 Canada (StatCan/White House): Jun CPI +2.8% y/y vs 2.9% est (miss estimate; prior 3.2%); trimmed/median core both below 2% for first time in ~6 years. Trump signed Section 338 proclamations for additional 50% tariffs on many Canadian goods effective Aug 19 (energy/potash/critical minerals exempt).
中国6月全国城镇16—24岁劳动力失业率降至14.9%（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21； Caixin/NBS: −0.7 pp from May). 国务院常务会议要求确保完成全年目标任务、强化预算管理。 高盛表示7月晚些时候政治局会议可能释放更强宽松信号（彭博 Jul 21）。欧盟对阿里旗下全球速卖通开出5.5亿欧元罚单，阿里称将上诉。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

summary.text: Jul 21 Asia/UK data (investinglive/The Standard/Taiwan News): Taiwan Jun export orders +59.4% y/y vs 47.3% est (beat estimate; record NT$3.08tn, ICT +81.9%); HK Jun CPI +2.0% y/y vs 2.2% est (miss estimate; underlying +1.9%); UK May ILO unemployment 4.9% vs 5.0% est (miss estimate; payrolls −4k in Jun).
Jul 20–21 crypto: BTC ~$65k at Jul 20 US close (CoinDesk/Cointelegraph). Goldman PB record US tech de-grossing (~10% mkt-cap cut, 第一财经 Jul 21).

signal: Jul 21 A-share full-day rally (Shanghai +1.79%, ChiNext +7.05%, 2.96tn turnover) diverges from Jul 20 US risk-off (S&P −0.19%, Brent $89.22) and UK gilt selloff (5.049% 10y on Burnham fiscal flexibility). Taiwan Jun export orders +59.4% beat (AI/ICT demand) contrasts with HK CPI +2.0% miss and UK ILO 4.9% miss — mixed Asia inflation/labour vs strong tech pipeline. Goldman PB record US tech cut (彭博 Jul 21) and Kimi capacity pause keep AI-capex scrutiny live into Mag 7 earnings.
watch: Does Jul 21 chip/semi bid (2.96tn yuan turnover) hold through US earnings (Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22) and Brent ≥$89 — and does late-July Politburo deliver stronger easing signals (Goldman/Bloomberg Jul 21)? Taiwan +59.4% export-order beat vs HK CPI miss sets up a split read on Asia inflation into FOMC week.
globalRegime: Fed holds 3.50%–3.75% with Jul 14–15 CPI/PPI misses backward-looking while Jul 20 Brent $89.22 settle (+~20% MTD per CNBC) and 10y 4.594% re-price forward inflation. Jul 20 US equities reversed morning chip relief into a red close (S&P −0.19%); PHLX Semi rose ~0.5% Mon but remains in bear-market territory vs Jun 22 record. Jul 28–29 FOMC and Mag 7 earnings (Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22) are the next hard tests.

globalChanged.text: 特朗普誓言要让伊朗为造成美军士兵身亡付出数倍代价；伊朗支持的也门胡塞武装威胁对沙特实施海上封锁。与此同时，德黑兰称调解方提出缓和美伊冲突方案，据报其中一项建议是停火10天（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: Jul 21 UK (City AM/Independent): Andy Burnham became PM; said he would use “flexibility” within existing fiscal rules; 10y gilt yield rose ~8 bp to 5.049% (two-month high). John Healey named Chancellor (surprise vs Mahmood speculation).
Jul 20 Canada CPI (StatCan): headline +2.8% y/y vs 2.9% est (miss estimate; prior 3.2%); m/m −0.4%. Trimmed CPI 1.8% and median CPI 1.9% — both below 2% for first time in ~6 years.

Jul 21 UK labour (investinglive/ONS): May ILO unemployment 4.9% vs 5.0% est (miss estimate; prior 4.9%); employment change +147k vs +80k est (beat estimate); average weekly earnings +4.3% 3m/y vs +4.5% est (miss estimate). June payrolls change −4k.

Jul 21 Taiwan export orders (Taiwan News/MOEA): June orders +59.4% y/y vs 47.3% est (beat estimate; prior +47.2%) to record NT$3.08tn (US$95.3bn). ICT orders +81.9%, electronic +79.9%; US-sourced orders +83.6%.

Jul 21 Hong Kong CPI (The Standard/C&SD): June composite CPI +2.0% y/y vs 2.2% est (miss estimate; prior +2.0%); underlying inflation +1.9% (unchanged from May). Government warned Middle East oil tensions may lift future CPI.

Jul 20 US–Canada trade (White House/USTR): Trump signed three Section 338 proclamations imposing additional 50% tariffs on ~$20bn Canadian imports (autos, alcohol, dairy lists); effective Aug 19 (30 days). Energy, potash, Section 232 goods, fish, critical minerals exempt.
Jul 20 US official close (CNBC): S&P −0.19% to 7,443.28, Nasdaq −0.05% to 25,508.07, Dow −0.59% to 51,839.26 — morning rally fully reversed on oil/Middle East headlines; Apple −2%+ dragged the Dow.

Jul 20 oil official settle (CNBC): Brent Sep $89.22 (+1.3%); WTI Aug $83.23 (+0.9%). Intraday Brent touched $91.42 before easing on Iran FM negotiation comments; Trump said Iran will pay for three US troop deaths; Houthis declared a maritime embargo on Saudi Arabia.

Jul 20 Treasury (CNBC): 10y 4.594% (+5.3 bp), 2y 4.211% (+3 bp), 30y 5.115% (+5 bp) — yields rose as CENTCOM completed a ninth consecutive night of strikes and Kuwait reported intercepting Iranian drones.
Jul 20 semi partial recovery: PHLX Semiconductor Index +0.5% (新浪财经); SMH ETF modest gain led by Micron/AMD (CNBC) — partial bounce after Jul 17 bear-market threshold, not a trend reversal.

Jul 21 (第一财经): Goldman PB — hedge funds net-sold US tech in six of the past eight weeks; cumulative ~10% market-cap reduction since early June, record in data going back 10+ years, with “capitulation signs” in semi/AI-infrastructure.

Jul 20 crypto (CoinDesk/Cointelegraph): BTC one-month high $65,700 intraday, ~$65,000–$65,300 at US close — decoupling modestly from Nasdaq while oil stayed firm; Strategy raised $263M via stock sale the prior week (Cointelegraph).
Jul 21 earnings week (CNBC Jul 20): Mag 7 reports include Alphabet and Tesla Jul 22 after close; IBM, Intel, GE Vernova also this week.
特朗普政府宣布，在美国新建、扩建或翻新铝厂的企业从国外进口铝可享受关税折扣，税率从50%降至约25%（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalChanged.text: 鉴于可能违反反垄断法，美国联邦法官暂时叫停派拉蒙天舞以1100亿美元收购华纳兄弟探索公司的交易（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21）。

globalChanged.text: 谷歌据报正在开发一款用于优化Gemini人工智能模型的服务器芯片，最快可能于2028年投入部署；贝莱德据悉计划发行逾120亿美元债券，为Meta位于德州的数据中心园区提供融资（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21）。

sources.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

globalImplies.text: Jul 20 oil settle $89.22 overwrites disinflation relief for Jul 28–29 FOMC unless Hormuz flows normalize — Monday's +5 bp 10y move is the cross-asset read-through.
Partial PHLX Semi bounce (+0.5%) without a positive S&P close suggests Kimi/AI capex doubts persist into earnings — revenue beats may not lift multiples with Brent ≥$89.
Goldman PB record tech de-grossing (~10%) raises the bar for Alphabet/Tesla capex commentary to re-risk the AI complex.

globalTensions: Jul 20 PHLX Semi +0.5% vs S&P −0.19%; BTC ~$66k vs Brent $89.22; Goldman ~10% tech cut vs weekly BTC ETF inflows; Jul 21 Shanghai +1.79%/ChiNext +7.05% vs Jul 20 S&P −0.19%; Kimi demand surge vs sign-up pause.
chinaStance: Moderately loose via quantity (Jul 20 net OMO +1745亿元; Jul 21 net +165亿元 per 新浪财经) and explicit state-team equity support (insurers pledged Jul 20, Caixin Jul 21), cautious on price — Jul LPR held 3.0%/3.5%. State Council growth-target emphasis (Bloomberg inbox Jul 21) and Goldman Politburo easing watch keep fiscal/monetary expectations active.

chinaChanged.text: Jul 21 A-share official close (网易财经): Shanghai +1.79%, Shenzhen +4.81%, ChiNext +7.05%, STAR +10.73%; turnover 2.96tn yuan. 半导体设备指数深V振幅超17%（第一财经 Jul 21）；PBOC net OMO +165亿元 (2530 − 2365亿元 @ 1.4%).

中国6月全国城镇16—24岁劳动力失业率降至14.9%（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21； Caixin/NBS: −0.7 pp from May to 14.9%).

chinaChanged.text: Jul 21 (Caixin): China Life, PICC, China Pacific, Ping An and New China Life pledged increased long-term equity investment Jul 20 to support the market after last week's losses — extends state-team rescue narrative.
Jul 21 (Caixin): Citigroup upgraded Chinese equities to overweight and downgraded South Korea — global banks rotating toward cheaper China AI exposure as Korea trade cools.
高盛表示，鉴于当前经济背景某些方面与2024年大规模刺激方案出台前类似，7月晚些时候召开的中共中央政治局会议可能释放更强的宽松信号（彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 Jul 21）。

chinaImplies.text: Jul 21 full-day chip rebound (ChiNext +7.05%, turnover 2.96tn) shows domestic dip-buying held through afternoon after morning semi deep-V.
Youth unemployment 14.9% (third monthly decline) eases near-term labor anxiety but stays above year-ago — Politburo may still lean accommodative.
Insurer equity pledges + Citi China upgrade (Jul 21) reinforce state-team bid alongside quantity easing (Jul 21 net OMO +165亿元).

chinaDivergences: Jul 21 Shanghai +1.79%/ChiNext +7.05% vs Jul 20 S&P −0.19%; BTC ~$66k vs Brent $89.22; UK gilts 5.049% vs US 10y 4.594%; Kimi demand surge vs sign-up pause; Goldman record US tech de-grossing vs China semi rebound.

assetFramework.regime: AI capex-return scrutiny vs oil/geo inflation — Mag 7 earnings as next hard test
assetFramework.driver: Jul 20 S&P −0.19% / Nasdaq −0.05% (official close); opened +0.5%/+0.8% then reversed; Brent $89.22 settle; Goldman PB ~10% tech cut
assetFramework.read: Jul 20 reversal shows oil/geo still dominates morning chip relief — earnings must offset Brent ≥$89 and Kimi capex doubts
assetFramework.invalidator: Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22: capex guide stable with S&P reclaiming 7,500 and Brent <$85

assetFramework.regime: Geo/oil inflation premium vs safe-haven bid — bear-steepening risk

assetFramework.read: Jul 20 belly/long-end rose with oil despite last week's CPI/PPI misses — inflation channel re-engaged
assetFramework.invalidator: 10y falls below 4.50% with two consecutive Brent settles <$85

assetFramework.read: Geo/oil bid likely supported USD at margin Jul 20 — no fresh DXY close verified in coverage window
assetFramework.invalidator: DXY breaks lower while Brent >$89 and yields keep rising

assetFramework.driver: Jul 20 10y +5 bp to 4.594%; Brent $89.22; weekend Kuwait infrastructure strikes
assetFramework.read: Higher yields vs elevated oil = mixed hedge read; geo floor intact but real-yield headwind on rallies
assetFramework.invalidator: Gold falls below $3,950 while Brent also rises for three sessions

assetFramework.read: Official Mon settle confirms weekend escalation premium — diplomacy comments only partially retraced intraday spike
assetFramework.invalidator: Brent settles below $82 with Hormuz crossings >40/day for five sessions

signals.name: Jul 21 A-share full-day rally (ChiNext +7.05%)
signals.evidence: 网易财经 Jul 21 close: Shanghai +1.79%, ChiNext +7.05%, STAR +10.73%; turnover 2.96tn yuan; semi equipment deep-V +10%+ (第一财经).

evidenceSources.label: 第一财经 semi V Jul 21

signals.mechanism: Domestic dip-buying in semis held through afternoon close — tests whether bid survives US Mag 7 earnings and Brent ≥$89.
signals.disprovedIf: Shanghai closes below 3,750 within five sessions with ChiNext giving back >50% of Jul 21 gain.

signals.name: UK gilt selloff on Burnham fiscal flexibility (5.049% 10y)
signals.evidence: City AM/Independent Jul 21: Burnham said he would use flexibility within fiscal rules; 10y gilt 5.049% (+8 bp, two-month high); Healey named Chancellor.
signals.mechanism: Early fiscal-risk repricing in G7 long-end adds to oil-driven inflation premium ahead of Jul 28–29 FOMC.
signals.disprovedIf: 10y gilt yield falls below 4.85% for three sessions without oil relief.

signals.name: Jul 20 Brent $89.22 settle after $91.42 intraday
signals.evidence: CNBC Jul 20: Brent Sep settled +1.3% at $89.22 (intraday $91.42); WTI $83.23; Trump casualty post; Houthi Saudi embargo; ~20% MTD surge.
signals.mechanism: Official Mon settle locks weekend escalation premium into forward inflation pricing ahead of Jul 28–29 FOMC and Mag 7 earnings.
signals.disprovedIf: Brent official settle below $82 for three sessions with Hormuz crossings >40/day.

signals.name: Jul 20 US index reversal on oil despite chip bounce
signals.evidence: CNBC Jul 20: S&P −0.19% to 7,443.28 after opening +0.5%; Nasdaq −0.05% after +0.8% open; SMH modest gain; 10y +5 bp to 4.594%.
signals.mechanism: Oil/geo channel dominates partial semi recovery — sets hostile backdrop for Alphabet/Tesla capex commentary Jul 22.
signals.disprovedIf: S&P reclaims 7,500 with Brent settle <$85 and SOX +3% same week.

signals.name: Goldman PB record US tech de-grossing (~10%)
signals.evidence: 第一财经 Jul 21: net sellers six of past eight weeks; ~10% market-cap cut since early June — record in 10+ years of PB data; “capitulation signs” in semi/AI infrastructure.
signals.mechanism: Institutional positioning unwind amplifies Kimi K3 narrative — raises earnings-week bar for AI re-risking even if SOX bounces.
signals.disprovedIf: Three consecutive weeks of net tech buying with SOX reclaiming 12,400.

signals.name: Kimi K3 sign-up pause after demand surge
signals.evidence: Caixin Jul 21: Moonshot halted new Kimi K3 subscriptions Jul 19; 2.8T-parameter model released Jul 17 — demand overwhelmed compute.
signals.mechanism: Confirms domestic adoption strength but also capacity limits — keeps open-weight AI pricing pressure on global semi/AI multiples.
signals.disprovedIf: Sign-ups reopen within a week with no further A/H semi selloff.

signals.name: BTC ~$65k hold vs Brent $89.22
signals.evidence: CoinDesk/Cointelegraph Jul 20: BTC one-month high $65,700, ~$65k at close; Brent $89.22 settle same session.
signals.mechanism: Modest decoupling from Jul 17 risk-off — either front-running Fed hold or crowded $65k resistance into earnings.
signals.disprovedIf: BTC below $62,500 while Brent also settles ≥$90 for three sessions.

signals.name: China buyback wave (100+ Jul 20 disclosures)
signals.evidence: 第一财经 Jul 21: 100+ firms disclosed buyback/increase Jul 20; Jul YTD ~103 repurchase plans (>160亿元 ceiling) per Wind.
signals.mechanism: Extends Jul 19 state-team narrative — may support Shanghai 3,796 level but STAR −2.28% shows semi stress under the bid.
signals.disprovedIf: Shanghai closes below 3,750 despite continued buyback announcements.

watchItems.headline: Jul 21 A-share full-day bid vs US earnings
watchItems.why: STRONG full-day chip rebound diverges from Jul 20 US risk-off.
watchItems.watch: Shanghai +1.79% close; ChiNext +7.05%; Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22 after close; Brent ≥$89.
watchItems.trigger: Shanghai closes below 3,750 while S&P also breaks 7,400.
watchItems.invalidator: Shanghai holds 3,850+ with Mag 7 capex guides stable.

watchItems.headline: Burnham/Healey fiscal path — UK 10y 5.049%
watchItems.why: STRONG gilt selloff on day-one flexibility comments.
watchItems.watch: First budget steps; 10y gilt vs US 10y spread; pound vs USD.
watchItems.trigger: 10y gilt closes above 5.15% for two sessions.
watchItems.invalidator: Burnham explicitly caps borrowing below current OBR path.

watchItems.headline: Mag 7 earnings — Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22
watchItems.why: STRONG AI-capex falsifier after Kimi K3 and Goldman ~10% tech cut.
watchItems.watch: Alphabet/Tesla Jul 22 after close; capex and cloud margin commentary.
watchItems.trigger: Alphabet or Tesla cuts AI capex guide with S&P below 7,400.
watchItems.invalidator: Both maintain or raise capex with SOX +3% and S&P above 7,500.

watchItems.headline: Brent $89.22 settle vs $91.42 intraday
watchItems.why: STRONG oil inflation signal into FOMC.
watchItems.watch: Official Tue Brent settle; Hormuz flows; Houthi Saudi embargo follow-through.
watchItems.invalidator: Official settle below $82 with crossings >40/day for five days.

watchItems.headline: Jul 21 Asia/UK data slate — printed
watchItems.why: Bloomberg inbox calendar items released Jul 21.
watchItems.watch: Taiwan Jun export orders +59.4% y/y (beat 47.3% est); HK Jun CPI +2.0% y/y (miss 2.2% est); UK May ILO unemployment 4.9% (miss 5.0% est).
watchItems.trigger: Taiwan ICT strength persists with USD/TWD firm while HK CPI re-accelerates above 2.5%.
watchItems.invalidator: All three prints fade from cross-asset pricing within 48h.

watchItems.headline: 国新办交通强国发布会 + 欧洲议会外事代表团访华
watchItems.why: Policy/diplomatic calendar from 彭博 央行和政府动态.
watchItems.watch: 10:00 国新办加快建设交通强国发布会；21–23日欧洲议会外交事务委员会代表团访华。
watchItems.trigger: Transport policy signals that move infra/rail equities >3%.
watchItems.invalidator: Event passes with no marketable policy delta.

watchItems.headline: Jul 20 US reversal — oil over chip relief
watchItems.why: STRONG cross-asset read for earnings week.
watchItems.watch: S&P 7,443.28 vs Jul 20 open; 10y 4.594%; SMH/SOX follow-through.
watchItems.trigger: S&P closes below 7,400 with Brent ≥$89 and 10y >4.60%.

watchItems.headline: Kimi K3 capacity pause + Goldman tech cut
watchItems.watch: Kimi sign-up status; Goldman PB weekly update; STAR vs Jul 20 −2.28%.
watchItems.trigger: SOX closes below 11,500 with another frontier-model headline.

watchItems.headline: Jul 21 PBOC liquidity — 1000亿元 treasury deposit maturity
watchItems.why: Quantity tool watch after Jul 20 net OMO +1745亿元.
watchItems.watch: Jul 21 OMO size vs 2365亿元 maturing (Sina weekly calendar); DR007.
watchItems.invalidator: Net drain with DR007 >1.50% for three sessions.

sources: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶 (Jul 21), 网易财经 (Jul 21 A-share close), 新浪财经 (Jul 21 A-share morning/OMO), 第一财经 (Jul 21 semi V, Goldman PB, coast guard), 华尔街见闻 (3776521 Changxin IPO), Caixin Global (Jul 21 youth unemployment, insurers, Citi upgrade, Kimi K3), StatCan (Jun CPI Jul 20), White House/USTR (Jul 20 Canada tariffs), City AM/Independent (Jul 21 Burnham gilts), CNBC (Jul 20 US close/oil/Treasury/earnings calendar), CoinDesk/Cointelegraph (Jul 20 BTC), Taiwan News (Jul 21 export orders), The Standard (Jul 21 HK CPI), investinglive (Jul 21 UK ILO).
singleSource: Omitted BlockBeats 303712 (Trump BTC video Jul 21 — theblockbeats.info unreachable in CI scan). Rejected BlockBeats stale flashes (wrong-year BTC $116k+ levels; news/59062 Polymarket page dates 2025). Rejected 华尔街见闻 3751515 (denylisted mid-day A/H wrap; +0.72% Shanghai conflicts with 网易财经 Jul 21 official close +1.79%). Also rejected 3751205/3751275/3751711/3751602 (2025 stale wraps). Youth unemployment 14.9% via Caixin/NBS. EU AliExpress €550mn fine via Bloomberg inbox only. Glassnode Insights not merged — no fresh on-chain capture this run. 今日图表 PNG at web/public/inbox-charts/bloomberg-2026-07-21.png (抗癌新药获批数量). 市场一览 desk color lives in marketOverview (not Global/China prose). Evening refresh merged Jul 21 Taiwan/HK/UK data prints; marketDashboard re-injected at publish.

marketOverview.note: Qualitative desk color from 彭博财经早茶 — not official closes.

source.label: 彭博 Markets Daily China / 财经早茶

items.label: 美国股市
items.text: 苹果和特斯拉下跌拖累大盘，芯片股在一系列财报公布前反弹

items.label: 中概股
items.text: 金龙中国指数上涨，阿里巴巴和京东集团对指数贡献最大

items.label: 美国债市
items.text: 美债追随英债下跌，特朗普对伊朗的威胁也令债市承压

items.label: 外汇市场
items.text: 彭博美元指数基本持稳，CPI数据显示加拿大通胀降温后，加元兑美元下跌。澳元跑赢其他G10货币

items.label: 欧洲股债
items.text: 财政风险拖累英国国债下跌并跑输同类债券。欧洲股市下跌，受到中东紧张局势拖累

items.label: 能源
items.text: 油价小幅上涨，交易员权衡中东冲突恶化消息以及暂时停火可能性

items.label: 金属
items.text: 黄金价格小幅下跌，交易员评估美联储加息遏制通胀的可能性。伦敦期铜上涨

marketDashboard.note: Equities, FX, gold futures, and Brent use the latest two Yahoo daily closes; US Treasuries use the official daily yield curve (bp vs prior print); BTC is CoinGecko 24h change; funding compares adjacent OKX prints. Snapshot captured at generate time — not live on the page.
